access.title: Insider Access
access.description: Direct access through our local partners and a registered travel operator, opening doors that are hard to reach on your own.
access.short: Doors opened by local partners and a registered operator.

groups.title: Small Groups
groups.description: Limited to 4-8 guests to ensure genuine immersion, intimate tastings, and no crowds.
groups.short: Never more than 8 guests. No crowds.

curation.title: Thoughtful Curation
curation.description: Expertly balanced itineraries featuring legendary appellations alongside hidden local gems.
curation.short: Legendary appellations and hidden local gems.

execution.title: Seamless Execution
execution.description: From boutique luxury hotels to Michelin-starred dining, every detail is handled with precision.
execution.short: Every detail handled, end to end.

culture.title: Cultural Integration
culture.description: Great wine deserves context. Experience the region's art, history, and gastronomy holistically.
culture.short: Art, history and gastronomy, not just wine.

guidance.title: Founder-Led
guidance.description: Led by founders alongside trusted local sommeliers and estate insiders who share their knowledge and passion for the terroir.
guidance.short: Led by founders and trusted local insiders.

s1.title: Choose Your Destination
s1.desc: Explore our experiences and find the trip that calls you.

s2.title: Let's Talk
s2.desc: Reach one of the founders directly on WhatsApp. We advise you and hold your spot.

s3.title: Book Your Place
s3.desc: With a simple, secure process, you confirm your experience. Places are limited.

s4.title: Live the Experience
s4.desc: All that's left is to enjoy. We take care of everything else.

home.testimonial: Whether you're a collector seeking unique experiences, a sommelier exploring new regions, or simply someone who enjoys the beauty of a glass of wine, we craft experiences worthy of your palate and curiosity. This isn't wine tourism. It's wine immersion.

trips.title: Where we're heading
trips.comingSoonNote: Join the list and be the first to know when it opens.

slider.mendoza: Malbec at the Foot of the Andes
slider.ribera: The Hidden Soul of Spanish Wine

home.backingBody: The Wine Trips journeys are operated by Blisniuk & Amanov, a travel agency registered in Argentina (EVyT File No. 20943). Small groups, direct human contact, and a licensed operator behind every booking.

experiences.title: Curated Collections
experiences.subtitle: Discover meticulously curated journeys to the world's most celebrated wine regions. Each experience offers exclusive access, expert guidance, and unforgettable moments.
experiences.elsewhereSub: We are available to discuss custom requirements for private groups and corporate retreats.

contact.title: The Waiting List
contact.subtitle: Our journeys are intimate by design. Join the list to secure priority access to upcoming allocations.
contact.meetExpertsSub: Prefer to speak with someone? Schedule a complimentary consultation to discuss your specific requirements.

about.heroQuote: A wine enthusiast who decided to share the journey
about.story1: Like many of the best stories, this one began with a leap of faith. After building a career at Amazon, I found myself increasingly drawn not to the boardroom, but to the vineyard—to the stories bottled in glass, the history rooted in soil, and the people who dedicated their lives to the art of winemaking.
about.story2: I pursued my passion seriously by studying all there is about wine, but knowledge alone wasn't enough. I needed to experience it. I traveled to the world's most revered wine regions, knocking on cellar doors and breaking bread with winemakers. On the right, you can see an image of myself joking with Piero Incisa Della Rocchetta. Crazy right?
about.story3: What I discovered was that true luxury in wine isn't just about the label; it's about access and connection. It's about sitting at the family table, tasting barrels that will never reach the market, and understanding the soul of a place. That is why I founded The Wine Trips—to open those same doors for you.
about.manifesto: The Wine Trips was created to serve a specific purpose: bring people closer to wine through enriching experiences while supporting wine producers.
about.valueSustainabilityText: Global wine consumption is changing. Markets are shifting, younger generations are drinking less, and both the world's finest estates and small family producers are navigating an industry in transition. We believe wine tourism is one of the most meaningful responses to that challenge: bringing curious, engaged visitors directly to the origin, turning a bottle into a conversation, and a conversation into a lasting connection with a place.
about.valueQualityText: The Wine Trips deliberately keep our groups small and our experiences deep. Not because wine is only for a select few — it isn't — but because genuine understanding of a place cannot be rushed or scaled. Demystifying the idea that wine is only for those “who know about wine” is one of our key principles, as it brings more people together around wine. Quality over volume is our commitment, both to our guests and to the producers who open their doors for us.
about.valueRespectText: Every journey we design is also an act of advocacy for the regions, the producers, and the craft behind every bottle of wine. By doing what we do best, we are building bridges between the people who make wine and the people who love it; or are about to.
about.valuePartnershipText: If you are a producer who shares our vision, The Wine Trips would love to talk to you. Whether you are a boutique producer taking your first steps in wine tourism or an established estate looking for a quality-focused partner, what matters to us is a shared commitment to the experience.
about.partnerSub: Are you a winery or hospitality partner? We'd love to hear from you.
